package rulecoverage

func NegativeBunSelectScanWithoutLimit() string {
    ruleID := "bun_select_scan_without_limit"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Bun select-and-scan request paths without a visible limit or pagination marker."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
